title: Traceability Matrix (cross-cutting)
description: v2.0 SDLC 4단계 chain harness 의 cross-cutting 산출물. UC-* → BHV-* → AC-* → TC-* → IMPL-* + commit_hash forward+backward link 매트릭스. ★ DO-178C bidirectional traceability + IEC 62304 차용 (Official research 권고). 매 chain stage gate 종결 시 갱신 의무. DEC-2026-05-06-v2.0-i-strict-채택 정합.

matrix.description: 각 cell = end-to-end chain trace (UC → BHV → AC → TC → IMPL + commit_hash)

status.description: green = 모든 link 채움 + chain 4 통과 / yellow = 부분 link / red = critical link 끊김

severity.description: ★ F-SIM-002 (2026-05-18): source-grounded max-propagation — max(BR.severity, AP.severity ∈ AC.related_aps, AC.MoSCoW→severity). SSOT: methodology-spec/severity-cross-stage-mapping.md §2. 권위: ISO 26262 Part 9 ASIL inheritance + IEC 62304 Class A/B/C propagation (F-015 Claim B). 단일 MoSCoW 축 회귀 ❌.

business_rule_ids.description: ★ F-SIM-004 (2026-05-18): BR 1급 축 — BHV.br_refs ∪ AC.related_brs. DO-178C requirements axis 1급 의무 (F-015 Claim A ★★★).

antipattern_ids.description: ★ F-SIM-002 (2026-05-18): AC.related_aps — severity max-propagation source 추적용.

gaps.description: 끊긴 link 또는 missing element 목록 (e.g., 'TC-* 부재' / 'IMPL-* commit_hash 부재')

ticket_ref.description: ★ v8.6.0+ ticket-binding policy (DEC-2026-05-18) — UC ↔ 외부 ticket system Story 1:1 매핑. Tier 1 권고 / validator 강제 X / optional field. 자세한 정책 = methodology-spec/ticket-policy.md

id.description: platform 의 Story ticket key (예: Jira `MIG-1234` / GitHub Issues `#456`)

epic_id.description: 상위 Epic ticket id (도메인 단위 / 선택)

initiative_id.description: 상위 Initiative ticket id (Jira Premium / Advanced Roadmaps / 선택)

subtask_ids.description: chain stage 별 sub-task ticket id 매핑 (선택)

forward_coverage.description: planning → impl 쪽 chain 정합 % (UC → ... → IMPL link 채움 비율)

severity_floor.description: ★ DO-178C DAL A 차용 — critical=1.0 강제

severity_distinct_count.description: ★ F-SIM-002 (2026-05-18) audit signal — matrix cell severity 분포 수. == 1 시 MoSCoW 단축 회귀 의심 (release-readiness 신규 #14 sentinel).

severity_propagation_active.description: ★ F-SIM-002 (2026-05-18) — businessRules / antipatterns 입력 통과 여부 (false 시 propagation 미적용 → 회귀 위험).

mermaid_path.description: matrix.mermaid 경로 (graph view / ≥ 100 cell 분할 정책 = sub-plan-3 carry sp2-c4)
